task_description: Review and improve toss-plant-growth-miniapp until reviewer agrees OK. Worker 1 acts as Retention UX Specialist and audits flow clarity, friction, and habit loop. Worker 2 acts as Toss Miniapp UI Designer and improves visual hierarchy, themed camera shell, and Toss/TDS fit. Worker 3 acts as PM Agent and reviews product promise, preset clarity, and copy/positioning, then makes small concrete improvements if needed. Worker 4 acts as Reviewer gate and must review changes, block weak UX/product edits, and only approve when the app is OK. Everyone: coordinate through team state, do not revert each other, keep diffs small and reversible, verify with tests/build where relevant.
